arts.ttl: Forget Isak and Haaland, Newcastle are better than Man City in a vital area
arts.sum: It's no surprise to see two men dominate the discussion ahead of Newcastle United's Premier League clash at Manchester City this weekend. Let's be clear, Man City have some big injury issues and will be without world-class talent in Rodri, Manu Akanji and potentially Jack Grealish this weekend.

arts.ttl: Newcastle given huge encouragement to land £50m-rated striker with 60 G/A in 122 games
arts.sum: There’s still plenty of the 24/25 season to play, but Newcastle have already been given encouragement regarding one of their summer targets, Bryan Mbeumo. The Magpies are almost certain to face competition for his services, however, with reports suggesting that Man United want him to replace Antony. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says Liverpool can’t match Manchester City’s 100-point record
arts.sum: City achieved the historic haul as they clinched the first of Guardiola’s six Premier League titles in 2017-18.

arts.ttl: 'I'm waiting' - Pep Guardiola uses Liverpool and Ilkay Gundogan to defend Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about how the Premier League has changed in the last few years

arts.ttl: Guardiola questions whether anyone can match Manchester City’s centurions
arts.sum: Guardiola: ‘Who would do 100 points now? I’m waiting’ Manager confirms Manuel Akanji out for up to 10 weeks Pep Guardiola has pointed to Liverpool being unable to beat Manchester City’s 100-point Premier League title triumph as an example of how many of his team’s records may never be beaten. Guardiola led City to a record points total in 2017-18. That was the first of City’s six championships under him, with last season’s fourth in succession also a record achievement.
